name: Grace Lin
shortBio: Leads Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Hong Kong, and Macau coverage, with a focus on urban contrast, transport logic, and Pearl River Delta city pairings.
fullBio: Grace Lin is the South China editor at China Travel Notes. She leads coverage across Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Hong Kong, and Macau, with particular interest in city contrast, food and nightlife districts, hotel-base decisions, and the practical logic of moving around the Pearl River Delta without overbuilding the route.
expertise: South China district and hotel strategy
Urban nightlife and cross-border city pairings
reviewProcess: Grace reviews pages for district fit, route efficiency, evening usefulness, and whether South China advice still reflects realistic movement between dense urban bases.
seoDescription: Read Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Hong Kong, and Macau travel coverage by Grace Lin at China Travel Notes.
